description: Recall priority context for a single known scope by walking that scope and its ancestors. Call after receiving a task with a summary of what you are working on. With a query, uses FTS5 inside the ancestor walk. Without a query, returns all entries visible at the target scope. Use cx_search when you need content search across descendants, set, or all scopes. Returns metadata + snippet for two-phase retrieval; use cx_get for full body. IMPORTANT: The query uses FTS5 with implicit AND between words. Use 1-3 keywords, not full sentences. More words = fewer results. Examples: 'auth migration' (good), 'how does the authentication migration work' (too many words, likely 0 results). Use OR for alternatives: 'auth OR authentication'. Use prefix matching: 'migrat*'.

kinds.description: Filter to specific entry kinds (OR logic). Valid values: fact, decision, preference, lesson, reference, feedback, pattern, observation.

limit.description: Maximum number of entries to return. Default: 20, max: 200.

max_tokens.description: Maximum token budget for the response. Results are trimmed to fit within this budget, prioritizing higher-relevance entries. Uses ~4 chars/token estimation.

query.description: FTS5 search query. Use 1-3 keywords (implicit AND); keywords match, full sentences match nothing. Supports prefix queries (rust*), phrase queries ("scope path"), and boolean operators (AND, OR, NOT). Use OR between synonyms: 'auth OR authentication'. Omit to return all entries at the target scope via ancestor walk.

scope.description: Singular scope target. Send a JSON object {kind, ...} where kind is one of: 'path' (with 'path'), 'cwd_inferred' (optional 'cwd'), 'project' (with 'project'), 'repo' (with 'project', 'repo'), 'session' (with 'project', 'session', optional 'repo'). See the schema's examples field for canonical shapes. Broad selectors (subtree, set, all) are rejected by cx_recall; use cx_search. Default: global.

cwd.description: Filesystem path used for scope inference. Optional for kind 'cwd_inferred'.

path.description: Canonical scope path beginning with 'global'. Required for kind 'path'; required for kind 'subtree' on broad shapes.

project.description: Project identifier. Required for kind 'project', 'repo', and 'session'.

repo.description: Repo identifier. Required for kind 'repo'. Optional for kind 'session'.

tags.description: Filter to entries with any of these tags (OR logic). Pass a JSON array: ["tag1", "tag2"].

name: cx_recall

outputSchema.description: Recall response: query header, ranked rows, and capability advisories.

advisories.description: Capability advisory messages returned with the recall result.

entries.description: Ranked recall rows. Order is significant.

score.description: Normalised relevance score in [0, 1] on Search routing. Omitted on non-search routings.

snippet.description: Smart snippet of the entry body, with matched query terms bracketed when applicable.

candidates.description: Total candidates considered before token-budget trimming.

kinds_histogram.description: Per-kind counts across the returned rows.

query.description: Free-text query the caller supplied. Omitted when the recall was tag/scope-only.

returned.description: Number of rows in `entries` after token-budget trimming.

routing.description: Routing branch chosen by the recall pipeline (search, browse_fallback, scope_resolve, tag_scope_walk).

scope_chain.description: Scope path plus ancestors walked, in order.

tags_histogram.description: Per-tag counts across the returned rows.

tier.description: Search tier the cascade settled on (none, exact, prefix, split_or). Omitted on non-search routings.

tokens.description: Estimated token total of the rendered response.
